name: bps
tagline: Lighting the Future with Innovative Power Solutions
description: BPS (Bright Power Semiconductor) is a leading Chinese fabless semiconductor company specializing in LED driver ICs and power management solutions. Founded in 2008, BPS has become one of the largest LED driver chip suppliers in China, serving global markets with high-performance, cost-effective solutions for general lighting, smart home, and consumer electronics applications.
longDescription:
Bright Power Semiconductor (BPS) is a premier fabless semiconductor company headquartered in Shanghai, China. Established in 2008, BPS has grown to become one of the world's leading suppliers of LED driver integrated circuits, with annual shipments exceeding 10 billion units. The company specializes in analog and mixed-signal IC design, focusing on LED lighting drivers, AC-DC power management, and DC-DC conversion solutions.

BPS serves diverse markets including general lighting, smart home, consumer electronics, and industrial applications. Their comprehensive product portfolio covers non-isolated LED drivers, isolated LED drivers, smart lighting control chips, and various power management ICs. With strong R&D capabilities and a commitment to innovation, BPS holds numerous patents in power electronics and LED driver technology. The company is publicly listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange STAR Market, demonstrating its financial strength and market position.

coreProducts.name: Non-Isolated LED Drivers
coreProducts.description: High-efficiency non-isolated LED driver ICs for general lighting applications with integrated power MOSFETs and comprehensive protection features

coreProducts.name: Isolated LED Drivers
coreProducts.description: Flyback and isolated Buck LED driver solutions for high-power and safety-critical lighting applications

coreProducts.name: Smart Lighting Control
coreProducts.description: Intelligent LED driver ICs with dimming, color temperature control, and wireless connectivity for smart home applications

coreProducts.name: AC-DC Power Management
coreProducts.description: General purpose AC-DC power management ICs for adapters, chargers, and auxiliary power supplies

industries.name: General Lighting
industries.description: LED bulbs, tubes, panels, and downlights for residential and commercial lighting

industries.name: Smart Home
industries.description: Intelligent lighting systems with wireless control and automation features

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Power adapters, chargers, and LED backlighting for consumer devices

industries.name: Industrial Lighting
industries.description: High-bay lights, floodlights, and street lighting for industrial applications

industries.name: Automotive Lighting
industries.description: Interior and exterior LED lighting solutions for vehicles

certifications.name: AEC-Q100
certifications.description: Automotive Electronics Council qualification for automotive ICs

certifications.name: IEC 62368-1
certifications.description: Safety certification for audio/video and IT equipment

seoTitle: BPS LED Driver Distributor | Bright Power Semiconductor ICs | BeiLuo Electronics
seoDescription: Authorized BPS distributor offering LED driver ICs, AC-DC power management chips, and smart lighting solutions. Technical support and competitive pricing.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor of BPS products?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized core distributor of Bright Power Semiconductor (BPS) products. We maintain direct partnerships with BPS and have access to their complete product portfolio including LED driver ICs, AC-DC power management chips, and smart lighting solutions. Our authorization ensures customers receive genuine BPS products with full technical support, warranty coverage, and access to the latest product roadmaps. We also provide value-added services including reference design support, application engineering assistance, and inventory management.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify specific product availability and discuss your project requirements. We can provide official authorization letters upon request.

faqs.question: What are BPS's core competitive advantages?
faqs.answer: BPS offers several key competitive advantages: 1) Market leadership - one of the world's largest LED driver IC suppliers with over 10 billion units shipped annually; 2) Cost-effectiveness - optimized designs providing excellent performance at competitive prices; 3) Comprehensive portfolio - covering non-isolated and isolated LED drivers, smart lighting, and power management; 4) Strong R&D - continuous innovation with numerous patents in power electronics; 5) Local support - strong technical presence in Asia with rapid response times; 6) Quality reliability - proven track record in mass production with low PPM defect rates. These advantages make BPS ideal for cost-sensitive lighting applications requiring high reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate BPS products for your LED lighting and power management applications where cost-effectiveness and reliability are important.

faqs.question: How do BPS LED drivers compare to international brands?
faqs.answer: BPS LED drivers offer competitive performance compared to international brands like NXP, Onsemi, and TI: Performance - comparable efficiency and reliability metrics; Cost - typically 20-40% lower pricing for equivalent specifications; Support - faster local technical support in Asia; Portfolio - comprehensive range covering most lighting applications; Quality - proven in mass production with major lighting manufacturers. While international brands may have broader portfolios and longer track records in certain segments, BPS excels in general lighting applications where cost optimization is critical. The choice depends on specific application requirements, volume, and support needs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider BPS for general lighting applications where cost-effectiveness is important while maintaining quality standards.

faqs.question: What support services does BeiLuo provide for BPS products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo provides comprehensive support services for BPS products including: 1) Technical consultation and product selection guidance; 2) Reference design review and optimization recommendations; 3) Application engineering support for schematic and PCB design; 4) Thermal and EMI analysis; 5) Failure analysis and troubleshooting; 6) Supply chain management and long-term availability planning; 7) Custom firmware development support. Our FAE team has extensive experience with BPS LED drivers and power management ICs, and can assist from initial concept through production deployment.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team early in your design cycle to leverage our expertise and ensure optimal BPS product integration.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for BPS products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for BPS products vary by product family and market conditions. Standard LED driver ICs typically have 6-10 week lead times, while newer products or specialized variants may require 10-14 weeks. As an authorized core distributor, BeiLuo maintains strategic inventory of popular BPS products to support immediate requirements. For high-volume production programs, we recommend establishing forecast agreements to secure allocation and optimize delivery schedules. Contact our sales team for current lead time information and availability status for specific part numbers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Plan your procurement strategy with our team to ensure timely delivery. Consider buffer stock for critical production schedules.

faqs.question: Does BPS provide automotive-grade products?
faqs.answer: Yes, BPS offers automotive-grade LED driver ICs designed for vehicle lighting applications. These products undergo AEC-Q100 qualification and support extended temperature ranges (-40°C to +125°C). BPS automotive solutions include interior lighting drivers, exterior lighting controllers, and display backlighting solutions. The products feature enhanced reliability, comprehensive fault protection, and electromagnetic compatibility suitable for automotive environments. Long-term supply commitments and PPAP documentation are available for automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for automotive product roadmaps and qualification documentation for your vehicle electronics projects.

faqs.question: What development tools are available for BPS products?
faqs.answer: BPS provides comprehensive development resources including: 1) Reference designs - complete schematics, PCB layouts, and BOMs for typical applications; 2) Evaluation boards - pre-built boards for testing and validation; 3) Application notes - detailed design guides for various topologies; 4) Simulation models - SPICE models for circuit simulation; 5) Design calculators - Excel-based tools for component selection; 6) Software tools - configuration utilities for smart lighting products. BeiLuo provides access to these tools along with technical documentation and training resources to accelerate your development cycle.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo to access BPS development tools and reference designs for your project.

faqs.question: How does BeiLuo ensure product authenticity and quality?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo ensures BPS product authenticity through direct sourcing from authorized channels, eliminating gray market risks. Each product shipment includes full traceability documentation and certificates of conformance. We implement strict quality controls including incoming inspection, ESD-safe handling, and proper storage conditions. All BPS products come with manufacturer warranty and technical support entitlements. BeiLuo also provides counterfeit detection services and can verify product authenticity through BPS's official channels upon request.
faqs.decisionGuide: Purchase BPS products through BeiLuo to ensure authenticity, warranty coverage, and access to official technical support.
